metadata.task_title: Adding an image to a PowerPoint Presentation Slide
metadata.instruction: Add the photo Task ID 62.jpg to Task ID 62.pptx, both in Document > Task 62 folder.
metadata.context: I want to add a picture of myself to the presentation

l3.rationale: Dismisses the notification banner using its dismiss button.

l4.rationale: Clears the Explorer banner, goes to Documents, opens Task 62, and launches the Task ID 62 presentation.

l5.rationale: Navigates through the file browser and opens Task ID 62.pptx so it can be edited.
